tenant.federation.description: View and manage federation status for your organization
tenant.federation.federate_all_confirm: Are you sure you want to federate all :count local users?
tenant.federation.federate_selected_conf: Are you sure you want to federate :count selected users?
tenant.federation.federate_user_descript: Add an existing user to the federation group
tenant.federation.federate_warning: Once federated, this user's data will be synced with other tenants in the group.
tenant.federation.federated_users_descri: Users that are synced with other tenants in the federation
tenant.federation.local_only_users_descr: Users that exist only in this tenant and are not federated
tenant.federation.master_tenant_descript: As the master tenant, user changes made here will be propagated to all other tenants in the federation group.
tenant.federation.master_user_descriptio: This is the original user that other tenant users are synced from. Changes to this user will propagate to linked tenants.
tenant.federation.no_federated_users: No federated users in this tenant
tenant.federation.not_federated_descript: This organization is not part of a federation group. Federation allows users to be synced across multiple tenants.
tenant.federation.sync_strategy.title: Sync Strategy
tenant.federation.synced_data_descriptio: The data that is synchronized for this user across federated tenants
tenant.federation.title: Federation
tenant.federation.unfederate_confirm: Are you sure you want to unfederate ":name"? They will become a local-only user.
tenant.federation.user_info_description: View and manage federation status for this user
tenant.federation.user_is_federated: This user is synchronized across multiple tenants in the federation
tenant.federation.user_not_federated: This user exists only in this tenant
tenant.federation.user_not_federated_des: This user is not part of any federation group. If your organization is federated, you can add this user to sync their data across tenants.
